
### diminishing returns: uneven split 



* Can we split up some logic (e.g. adder) arbitrarily?
* Probably not...
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineUneven.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineUneven.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/deeperPipelineUneven.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
